svg.font-family: -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.aria-label: The chain of events from Amazon's jailbreak finding to the suspension of Fable 5 and Mythos 5
svg.title: Amazon → White House → Anthropic: the 90-minute chain
svg.text: From "fix this code" to a global suspension in ~24 hours
Amazon researchers find the "fix this code" bypass
model returns restricted cyberattack info when asked to "fix" a codebase
Andy Jassy (Amazon CEO) flags it to senior administration officials
Thursday, Jun 11 — Amazon is Anthropic's largest investor
White House sends Anthropic an export-control letter
Friday, Jun 12, ~5:30 p.m. ET — no prior national-security notice
90-minute window to comply → Fable 5 + Mythos 5 pulled globally
restriction scoped to all foreign nationals, incl. Anthropic's own staff
Negotiation in D.C.: Tom Brown & Sarah Heck ↔ Lutnick & Cairncross
daily talks; Amodei calls the bypass narrow, not a universal jailbreak
Status Jun 16: still dark — no restoration date
possible path back: joint technical review + Jul-8 identity verification
Sources: Fortune, Axios, The Hill, Quartz, TechTimes (Jun 13–16, 2026). Timeline as reported.
